summary: Comprehensive testing of updated Quran Reader app completed successfully. Backend API tests show 100% success rate (33/33 tests passed). Frontend functionality works excellently with all major features including everyayah.com audio integration, hadith icons, Book View mode, Learn Arabic sections (Vocabulary & Phrases), Hifz module, and enhanced settings modal. All navigation and interactive features are working as expected.

integration_issues.issue: Modal overlay can intercept pointer events causing click issues, but ESC key and force clicks work as workarounds

design_issues.issue: Arabic text search still shows no results for 'Fatiha' search (previously reported issue persists)

passed_tests: Backend health check and all 33 API endpoints (100% success)
everyayah.com audio integration (/api/audio/ayah/v2) with direct mp3 URLs
Hadith ayahs list endpoint (/api/hadith/ayahs-with-hadith) returning 11 ayahs
Enhanced Learn Arabic with Vocabulary section (20 cards) and Phrases section (10 cards)
Speaker icons functional in Alphabet, Vocabulary, and Phrases sections
Hifz memorization module with stats display and surah selection
Book View mode with pagination controls working
Settings modal with all 6 options: Theme, Text Style, Translation, Size, Reciter, Tajweed, View Mode
Mobile menu functionality and responsive design
Navigation between all sections (Home, Surahs, Learn Arabic, Hifz, Bookmarks)
Surah reader with 7 ayahs loading correctly
Hadith icons appearing for relevant ayahs with modal display
Audio playback integration (everyayah.com URLs generated correctly)
All enhanced Learn Arabic tabs: Alphabet, Tajweed, Grammar, Vocabulary, Phrases

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor modal and search issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Arabic text search to properly handle Arabic surah names
Improve modal overlay click handling to prevent pointer event interception
